✦ Official Hosting Partner

Kinetic Hosting

Our official hosting partner for all FabiMvurice Interactive modpacks. Get powerful servers optimized for modded Minecraft with instant setup and 24/7 human support.

Create Your Server Learn More
44+ Games Supported
24/7 Human Support
99.9% Uptime Guarantee
$0.87 Per GB/Month

Simple Setup

Get Started in 3 Steps

From zero to playing with friends in under 10 minutes.

01
1

Use Our Link

Click the affiliate link below to visit Kinetic Hosting. It costs you nothing extra.

02
2

Pick a Plan

Choose a RAM tier that fits your modpack. 8 GB+ recommended for Create Unbound.

03
3

Install & Play

Use the one-click modpack installer and invite your friends. Ready in minutes.

What You Get

Built for Modded Minecraft

Everything you need to run heavy modpacks smoothly.

Instant Modpack Installation

One-click installation for popular modpacks including Create, Fabric, and Forge packs. Get your server running in minutes.

High RAM Plans

Plans up to 32GB RAM perfect for heavy modpacks like Create Unbound and tech-focused packs with large factories.

24/7 Human Support

Real humans available around the clock. No AI bots - get actual help when you need it most.

Custom Game Panel

Easy-to-use control panel with built-in mod/plugin installers, file manager, and server console.

Premium Hardware

High-performance NVMe SSDs and latest-gen processors for smooth gameplay even with 200+ mods.

Affordable Pricing

Starting at just $0.87/GB - up to 70% cheaper than competitors without sacrificing quality.

Our Partnership

Why We Chose Kinetic

We partnered with Kinetic Hosting because they understand modded Minecraft. Their servers handle our Create modpacks flawlessly, and their support team actually knows what they're doing. When our community members have issues, they get real help - not automated responses.

— FabiMvurice Interactive Team

Ready to Host Your Server?

Join thousands of players who trust Kinetic Hosting for their modded servers.

Get Started Now

Using our link supports us at no extra cost to you.
